payload.last_assistant_message:
PR created: https://github.com/adobe-ai-pod/mas/pull/10

**What was done:**
- Added `--merch-card-collection-header-filter-height: 66px` and `--merch-card-collection-header-search-min-height: 66px` to `merch-card-collection-header.plans` in both `plans.css.js` and `plans-v2.css.js` (increasing from 44px → 66px, ~50% taller)
- Committed and pushed the changes, then opened the PR against `main` closing issue #8
